title: Lucid Group (LCID) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: TipRanks' analysis of Lucid analyst forecasts shows a consensus Hold rating across the analyst community. Recent analyst activity includes several downgrades and price target reductions following Q1 2026 guidance suspension. The average price target of $14.86 implies significant upside potential if the company executes on production and cost reduction plans. However, the distribution of targets shows wide disagreement, with some bulls targeting $30 per share while bears target as low as $7. Analyst sentiment has turned increasingly cautious on the stock as the company has missed guidance and expanded losses. The Hold consensus reflects genuine uncertainty about whether Lucid can achieve profitability before capital constraints force a restructuring. Commentary emphasized the critical importance of Gravity SUV success and cost reduction execution.
